{{Quote|First, I like my quarters kept at least five degrees warmer than the rest of the ship. I only eat energy pudding, so stock up on that.|Archiban Kimble|<ref name="Welcome Doc" />}}
'''Energy pudding''' was a type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] that was frequently found in survival and [[Ration pack/Legends|ration packs]] in dehydrated form.<ref name="Storm" /> Energy pudding was edible by a wide array of [[Species/Legends|species]], including [[Human/Legends|Humans]],<ref name="Welcome Doc" /> [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrians]],<ref name="Wookiee" /> [[Ansionian]]s, and [[Mirialan/Legends|Mirialans]];<ref name="Storm" /> however, it was widely considered to lack a pleasant taste. The food, which came in wrapped bars and was brown in [[Color/Legends|color]],<ref name="Assault" /> was available as early as the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], and the combat [[Medic/Legends|medic]] [[Archiban Frodrick Kimble|Archiban Kimble]] survived almost entirely on pudding.<ref name="Welcome Doc" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] discovered the Ansionian [[Tooqui]] raiding her supplies during a [[Border dispute on Ansion/Legends|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]], and the [[Scoundrel/Legends|thief]] tried to threaten her with packs of energy pudding as weapons.<ref name="Storm" />

==Behind the scenes==
Energy pudding first appeared in the [[2002]] novel ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' by [[Alan Dean Foster]].<ref name="Storm" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
